results.title: Agentic AI Security: Wrong Context, Wrong Decisions at Machine Speed
results.description: Context is the central plank of AI in general, and agentic AI in particular. If an AI system doesn’t have the correct context, it cannot make the correct decisions. The post Agentic AI Security: Wrong Context, Wrong Decisions at Machine... results.title: CM calls for leveraging AI to boost maritime security
results.description: Odisha CM Mohan Charan Majhi urges AI, unmanned systems and monitoring networks to boost maritime security at MAMSG meet in Bhubaneswar; coastal funds highlighted.
